title: Filter a smart-button action to incoming pickings
task_prompt: The 'View Deliveries' button on purchase.request should open only the INCOMING stock pickings for that request.
failure_mode: Two mistakes: `view_type` is not a valid act_window key (the real key is `view_mode`), so the window opens with no configured view; and the domain is a flat tuple, not a list of leaf tuples, so Odoo raises 'Invalid domain'. Clicking the button lands on an error dialog / blank screen — a UX dead-end. No data is touched or corrupted, hence S1: annoying, not dangerous.

expected_detection.check: scenario / runtime path probe: invoke the button method and assert it returns a valid act_window (view_mode present, domain a well-formed list)

notes: Low blast radius but a good sensitivity check: the gate should catch the malformed action without over-reacting. A domain is always a list of ('field','op','value') leaves; `view_type` stopped being an act_window key years ago.
